design_philosophy: A sophisticated, pocket-FM style offline music player. It rejects the complex, cluttered interfaces of standard streaming giants in favor of clean typography, massive album art presentation, translucent glassmorphism for controls, and a pure monochromatic structural base with one striking accent color. Content is king—every track feels like an art piece.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Break out of standard 16px margins; use 24px to 32px for screen containers.

now_playing.style: Full screen modal/sheet. Dominant album art.
now_playing.album_art: Aspect ratio 1:1, full width minus 48px padding. Rounded-2xl (32px). Generates a soft diffuse shadow based on the artwork's dominant color.
now_playing.background: Translucent blurred background derived from the album art, or solid surface color if no art.
now_playing.controls: Generous spacing. Play/pause button is a massive circle (72x72) with primary color background. Seek bar uses primary color for progress and secondary for track.
now_playing.typography: Title is h2, artist is body_large in text_secondary.

mini_player.style: Floating pill above bottom tab bar. Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl).
mini_player.layout: Absolute bottom (above tabs), horizontal padding 16px. Height 64px.
mini_player.controls: Play/Pause right-aligned. Touching anywhere else opens Now Playing.

list_items.action: Right-aligned generic action icon (ellipsis or heart).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full py-4 px-8 font-semibold tracking-wide. Height 56px.
buttons.secondary: bg-surface_secondary text-text_primary rounded-full py-4 px-8 font-semibold. Height 56px.

bottom_tabs.style: Glassmorphism background (Expo BlurView) to let list content scroll underneath smoothly. Removes standard border.
bottom_tabs.icons: Minimal Phosphor Icons (duotone for active tabs, regular for inactive).

add_music_picker.style: Floating Action Button (FAB) or a massive outlined 'empty state' dashed card when no music exists.
add_music_picker.fab: Bottom right, bg-primary, rounded-full, 64x64, massive + icon.

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Spring animations for gestures (Now Playing drag down). Smooth 0.3s ease for opacity/state changes.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: N/A for mobile, focus on Tap/Press states. All pressable items must have an active opacity (0.7) or scale down (0.97) using React Native Reanimated or standard TouchableOpacity.
motion_and_interactions.list_entrance: Staggered fade-up for list items on initial load.

icons.style: Phosphor Icons. Duotone weight for active states, Regular for inactive. Bold for media controls (play, pause, skip, seek).

image_urls.description: Default Album Art placeholder (Minimalist acoustic guitar, close up)
Empty state illustration for Light Mode (Monochrome acoustic guitar)
Empty state illustration for Dark Mode (Abstract dark flowing fabric)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure primary accent color (#FF4500) meets 4.5:1 ratio against surface.
accessibility.touch_targets: All interactive elements MUST have at least 48x48 points of hit area.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `testID` attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Since this is a React Native Expo app, interpret these CSS/Tailwind-like philosophies into standard React Native StyleSheet, or use NativeWind if configured in the project.
For the Now Playing blurred background and bottom tabs, use `expo-blur`.
Ensure animations (like Now Playing gestures, play/pause transitions) use React Native Reanimated.
Album art colors can be extracted using a suitable metadata library or color-thief (e.g. `react-native-image-colors`).
Follow the Light/Dark mode using React Native's `Appearance` module or standard theme contexts.
Do NOT use web-only components like Shadcn/UI directly. You must recreate these minimal visual primitives (cards, inputs, sheets) using React Native components.
Do NOT use `` or web tags, use React Native `` and ``.
For the Sleep timer, implement it as a minimalist bottom sheet (`@gorhom/bottom-sheet` is recommended).
